inputs.name: recipient
inputs.description: Recipient email address (PII). Prefer per-message values in inputs; if params.recipient is configured as a default destination, this input should override it.
inputs.patternDescription: RFC-style email address in local@domain format

inputs.name: subject
inputs.description: Message subject line. Provide per-message content in inputs.

inputs.name: body
inputs.description: Message body text. Provide per-message content in inputs.

inputs.name: from_address
inputs.description: Sender email address. Can also be provided as params.from_address.
inputs.patternDescription: RFC-style email address in local@domain format

inputs.name: smtp_host
inputs.description: SMTP server hostname. Must be a public RFC-1123 style DNS hostname (IP literals are not allowed). Typically configured in params for connector/runtime defaults.

inputs.name: smtp_port
inputs.description: SMTP server port (for example 587 with STARTTLS or 465 with implicit TLS).

inputs.name: smtp_password
inputs.description: SMTP password secret reference or injected secret value. Mutually exclusive with api_key; do not provide both.

inputs.name: api_key
inputs.description: Provider API key secret reference/value when API-key based auth is used instead of SMTP password. Mutually exclusive with smtp_password; do not provide both.

inputs.name: smtp_secure
inputs.description: Use implicit TLS for SMTP transport. If both smtp_secure and smtp_tls are true, smtp_secure takes precedence.

inputs.name: smtp_tls
inputs.description: Use STARTTLS upgrade when supported by the SMTP server. Ignored when smtp_secure is true.

outputs.name: sent
outputs.description: True when the connector actually sent an email.

outputs.name: recipient
outputs.description: Resolved recipient email address for this send attempt. WARNING: This field contains PII (personally identifiable information). Ensure logs and stored outputs are redacted or hashed before persistence or sharing. Consumers must follow data retention and consent policies.

outputs.name: subject
outputs.description: Subject line used for the attempted message. This field may contain PII; avoid logging raw values and redact or hash before storing/persisting.

outputs.name: mock
outputs.description: Mode flag indicating whether this run was in mock/stub mode.

outputs.name: would_send
outputs.description: Dry-run/sendability result indicating whether the message would be sent with current inputs.

outputs.name: error_code
outputs.description: Machine-readable error code when delivery fails.

outputs.name: error_message
outputs.description: Sanitized human-readable error summary when delivery fails. Does not include raw SMTP/auth details, hostnames, usernames, passwords, stack traces, or quoted input values.

outputs.name: correlation_id
outputs.description: Non-sensitive correlation identifier for troubleshooting failed deliveries.
